stemHtml: An aircraft is on the 065° radial with a heading of 065°(M). The course is set to 240°. What will the CDI indicate?

options.a: TO flag, and the needle is 5 degrees to the left.
options.b: TO flag, and the needle is 5 degrees to the right.
options.c: FROM flag, and the needle is 5 degrees to the right.
options.d: FROM flag, and the needle is 5 degrees to the left.
